case_title: LUIS CORADO VS. MEX IRON WORKS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORADO, LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT MEX IRON WORKS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORADO, LUIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEX IRON WORKS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $12,067.72 PRINCIPAL, $270.93 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,638.65, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
